# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio authz bypass.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/api-gateway"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/users/*", "/api/v1/orders/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/admin-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/admin/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/payment-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/payments/process"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/reporting-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/reports/*", "/api/v1/analytics/*"]

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/backend-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/payments/process", "/api/v1/payments/validate"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/refund-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/payments/refund"]

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-service-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/backend-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/migration-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/data/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/backup-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/data/export"]

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/*"

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: health-check-allow
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/health", "/healthz", "/ready", "/readyz", "/live", "/livez"]

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: metrics-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      metrics: enabled
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/metrics", "/stats/prometheus"]

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: internal-api-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: internal-api
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/worker-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/scheduler-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST", "PUT"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/internal/jobs/*", "/api/v1/internal/tasks/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.headers[x-internal-token]
      notValues: [""]

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: audit-service-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/*"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/audit/log"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/compliance-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/admin-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/audit/query", "/api/v1/audit/export"]
